name: ManifestTable
summary: Maintains an index to every model component that is in the 3dm file. This is the "more comprehensive" table that contains all objects in all other tables.

methods.name: ActiveObjectCount
methods.summary: Total number of items in the manifest, including deleted items.

params.name: type
params.doc: [Missing <param name="type"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.FileIO.ManifestTable.ActiveObjectCount(Rhino.DocObjects.ModelComponentType)"]

methods.name: Contains
methods.summary: Determines if an items is contained in this table.

params.name: item
params.doc: An item, or null. Null is never contained.

returns.doc: True if the item is contained; otherwise, false.

methods.name: CopyTo
methods.signature: public void CopyTo(ModelComponent[] array, int arrayIndex)
methods.summary: Copies the content of this table to an array.

params.name: array
params.doc: The array to copy to.

params.name: arrayIndex
params.doc: The position in the array from which to start copying.

methods.name: FindId(Guid)
methods.summary: Uses the guid to find a model component. Deleted objects cannot be found by id. The guid is the value that is stored in the .Id property. In a single document, no two active objects have the same guid. If an object is replaced with a new object, then the guid persists. For example, if the _Move command moves an object, then the moved object inherits its guid from the starting object. If the Copy command copies an object, then the copy gets a new guid. This guid persists through file saving/opening operations. This function will not find grip objects.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID of model component to search for.

returns.doc: Reference to the rhino object with the objectId or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindId(Guid, ModelComponentType)
methods.signature: public abstract ModelComponent FindId(Guid id, ModelComponentType type)
methods.summary: Uses the guid to find a model component. Deleted objects cannot be found by id. The guid is the value that is stored in the .Id property. In a single document, no two active objects have the same guid. If an object is replaced with a new object, then the guid persists. For example, if the _Move command moves an object, then the moved object inherits its guid from the starting object. If the Copy command copies an object, then the copy gets a new guid. This guid persists through file saving/opening operations. This function will not find grip objects.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID of model component to search for.

params.name: type
params.doc: The type to be searched. If this is Unset then all types are searched.

returns.doc: Reference to the rhino object with the objectId or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindId<T>(Guid)
methods.signature: public T FindId<T>(Guid id) where T : ModelComponent
methods.summary: Uses the guid to find a model component. Deleted objects cannot be found by id. The guid is the value that is stored in the .Id property. In a single document, no two active objects have the same guid. If an object is replaced with a new object, then the guid persists. For example, if the _Move command moves an object, then the moved object inherits its guid from the starting object. If the Copy command copies an object, then the copy gets a new guid. This guid persists through file saving/opening operations. This function will not find grip objects.

params.name: id
params.doc: Index of model component to search for.

returns.doc: Reference to the rhino object or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindIndex(Int32, ModelComponentType)
methods.signature: public abstract ModelComponent FindIndex(int index, ModelComponentType type)
methods.summary: Uses the index to find a model component. The index is the value that is stored in the .Index property.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of model component to search for.

params.name: type
params.doc: The type to be searched. Cannot be Unset.

returns.doc: Reference to the rhino object or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindIndex<T>(Int32)
methods.signature: public T FindIndex<T>(int index) where T : ModelComponent
methods.summary: Uses the index to find a model component. The index is the value that is stored in the .Index property.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of model component to search for.

returns.doc: Reference to the rhino object or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindName(String, ModelComponentType, Guid)
methods.signature: public abstract ModelComponent FindName(string name, ModelComponentType type, Guid parent)
methods.summary: Uses the name to find a model component. The name is the value that is stored in the .Name property. Deleted objects have no name.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of model component to search for.

params.name: type
params.doc: The type to be searched. Cannot be Unset.

params.name: parent
params.doc: Parent object id. This is only required for layers.

returns.doc: Reference to the rhino object or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindName<T>(String, Guid)
methods.signature: public T FindName<T>(string name, Guid parent) where T : ModelComponent
methods.summary: Uses the name to find a model component. The name is the value that is stored in the .Name property. Deleted objects have no name.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of model component to search for.

params.name: parent
params.doc: Parent object id. This is only required for layers.

returns.doc: Reference to the rhino object or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindNameHash(NameHash, ModelComponentType)
methods.signature: public abstract ModelComponent FindNameHash(NameHash nameHash, ModelComponentType type)
methods.summary: Uses the hash of the name to find a model component. Deleted objects have no name.

params.name: nameHash
params.doc: NameHash of model component to search for.

params.name: type
params.doc: The type to be searched. Cannot be Unset.

returns.doc: Reference to the rhino object or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindNameHash<T>(NameHash)
methods.signature: public T FindNameHash<T>(NameHash nameHash) where T : ModelComponent
methods.summary: Uses the hash of the name to find a model component. Deleted objects have no name.

params.name: nameHash
params.doc: Name hash of model component to search for.

methods.name: GetEnumerator()
methods.summary: Visits all model components in the document, including default ones.

methods.name: GetEnumerator(ModelComponentType)
methods.summary: Returns an enumerators that yields all model components, including default ones, relating to a particular type.

params.name: type
params.doc: The model component type.

methods.name: GetEnumerator<T>()
methods.signature: public virtual IEnumerator<T> GetEnumerator<T>() where T : ModelComponent
methods.summary: Visits all model components in the document, including default ones.

methods.name: GetModelComponentTypeFromGenericType<T>
methods.signature: public static ModelComponentType GetModelComponentTypeFromGenericType<T>() where T : ModelComponent
methods.summary: Returns the result of the ComponentType property of a ModelComponent.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Total number of items in the manifest, including deleted items.

properties.name: LongCount
properties.summary: Total number of items in the manifest, including deleted items.

properties.name: Parent
properties.summary: Returns the parent object. This is the RhinoDoc, or the File3md file.
